comment: Full cut v2 — APPROVED method (open/fan/card slide-onset+settle) across 20 pack windows. 152 beats.

segments.note: open: sealed pack held up to camera
fan: cards fanned out (approved)
card 1: chrome parallel slide-up + settle (approved)
card 2: slide-up + settle (approved)
card 3: slide-up + settle (approved)
card 4: clean 3->4 slide, cut before comeback (approved)
open: sealed Bowman Chrome pack held up to camera
card: Tennessee QB orange base, first card slides up out of wrapper + settles
card: Penn State Martin Jr navy/white, slides up + settles
card: Cincinnati gold-sparkle refractor (white jersey), slides up + settles
card: Michigan State Spartans #2, shown face-up in end flip (4th card of pack)
open: pack A foil torn open
card: A1 red player card slides up, settles
card: A2 gold/yellow accent player card
card: A3 purple/blue jersey player card
open: pack B sealed pack held up, tear start
fan: pack B cards fanned out
card: B1 player white uniform slides up, settles
card: B2 player with round medallion
card: B3 navy jersey player card
card: B4 player card
card: B5 red-stripe parallel/refractor
card: B6 player card (last of pack B)
open: pack C foil appears, tear start (window edge)
open: pack 1 foil tear, wrapper to camera
card: pack1 #1 green/gold chrome, settles centered
card: pack1 #2 orange player base, slide+settle
card: pack1 #3 purple refractor, slide onset+settle
card: pack1 #4 red/white player, slide+settle
card: pack1 #5 purple chrome refractor (rainbow hit), slide+settle
open: pack 2 foil tear
fan: pack 2 cards fanned to camera
card: pack2 #1 brown/purple chrome, slide+settle
card: pack2 #2 purple-border player, slide+settle
card: pack2 #3 orange/white player, slide+settle holds to end
open: pack 1 foil rip
fan: pack 1 cards pulled/fanned from wrapper
card: pack1 #1 white-jersey base
card: pack1 #2 orange-label card
card: pack1 #3 white-jersey refractor
open: pack 2 foil rip
fan: pack 2 cards pulled/fanned from wrapper
card: pack2 #1 gold-border dark card
card: pack2 #2 white-jersey gold-accent
card: pack2 #3 gold/yellow-accent card
card: pack2 #4 MS 5 insert white-jersey
fan: packA cards fanned out (window opens mid-pack)
card: gold MS5 refractor slides up + settles
card: white/red base card slides up + settles
card: blue-jersey player card slides up + settles
card: warm-tone player card (packA 4th) slides in + settles
open: packB opened, cards emerge
fan: packB cards fanned wide
card: purple/silver refractor player card settles + holds
card: orange player card slides up + settles
card: GLORY gold insert slides up + holds to end
card: white jersey card slides up + settles (slide already in progress at window start)
card: next card slides up + settles centered
card: gold/LA card slides up + settles, held
open: sealed foil pack held up, clear tear
fan: cards pulled out and fanned/spread
card: #1 orange-jersey RC, slides up and settles
card: #2 green refractor parallel
card: #3 orange/blue RC slides up, settles
card: #4 colorful refractor parallel, long admire
card: #5 dark/sepia-tone RC slides up, settles
card: #6 rainbow refractor, final card before mat empties
open: pack 1 sealed foil held up to camera
fan: pack 1 cards squared/fanned face-up in palm (fan clipped left)
card: pack1 #1 slow slide up + settle
card: pack1 #2 dark-jersey player
card: pack1 #3 green-background player
card: pack1 #4 red/white player
open: pack 2 foil held up to camera
card: pack2 #1 orange/white player
card: pack2 #2 player figure
card: pack2 #3 Alonzo Barnett III (Bowman B) settles, held to window end
open: sealed P Bowman foil pack held up to camera
fan: cards fanned out across mat (fan clipped left)
card: blue/red player base card slides up and settles
card: pink/colorful refractor slides up and settles
card: orange/red player photo card slides up and settles
card: holo/colorful refractor slides up and settles
card: gold/yellow 1st refractor slides up and settles
card: pink/purple refractor slides up and settles
open: sealed pack grabbed and torn
fan: cards fanned out
card: Georgia #3 base, front of the fan
card: Georgia #3 RB running pose, isolated
card: Georgia #1 QB base
card: SMU #92 (Maryland) base
card: Oklahoma OU base
card: Georgia #1 QB chrome
open: sealed foil pack held up to camera before tear
fan: cards fanned out across mat right after opening
card: dark/gold player card slides up and settles (first card after sorting)
card: red-top/yellow player card slides up and settles
card: orange/cream player card slides up and settles
card: orange/red player card slides up and settles (held through window end)
card: orange/white base card already held at window start (mid-pack)
card: purple/magenta parallel slides up and settles
card: pink/light refractor parallel slides up and settles
card: colorful sunburst holographic card slides up and settles
open: sealed foil pack held up to camera
fan: pulled cards revealed/squared in hand after tear
card: red/pink floral parallel + player slides into centered hold
card: white/light base + player
card: orange/yellow design + player
card: orange/purple colorful design + player
card: white/silver RC-style + player
card: green/dark design + player
card: prev-pack stack lifted and shown as a group
open: new foil wrapper torn open
fan: new pack cards fanned out and settling
card: first single card pulled and shown
card: Bowman base player card settles into hold
card: GLORY gold insert slides up and settles
card: photo player card settles into still hold
card: final card shown (still being shown at window end)
card: prior-pack card already held at window open (chrome card w/ figure)
card: slide onset 953.47, settles ~955 (prior pack)
card: slide onset 956.27, settles ~958.3 (prior pack), then pulled away to dead mat
open: foil pack tear begins ~968.6
fan: cards pulled out and fanned/held in hand
card: slide onset 982.07, settles ~983 (chrome card w/ purple corner), holds
card: slide onset 991.33, settles ~991.7 (light/white card)
card: slide onset 994.4, settles ~994.9 (light card)
card: slide onset 997.2, settles ~998.5 (orange/red card), long still hold
card: slide onset 1001.67, settles ~1002.2 (light card w/ figure), holds to window end
card: prior-pack tail, white/grey player card held steady at window start
card: prior-pack tail, red-bordered card shown alongside the white card
open: sealed orange foil pack lifted up to camera
fan: cards pulled from wrapper and spread/fanned in hand
card: card 1, dark green card slides in as fan clears, green logo
card: card 2, cream/tan player card slides up and settles
card: card 3, ornate white/silver base card slides up to settle
card: card 4, second ornate white base card slides up after card 3 set down
open: sealed foil pack held up to camera, start of tear
fan: cards pulled from wrapper and fanned out
card: card 1 slides up and settles centered, white border
card: card 2 slides up, settles held centered
card: card 3 pitcher slides up, settles and held
card: card 4 batter slides up, settles centered and held
card: card 5 slides up, settles held
card: final card slides up, settles centered and held readable
open: sealed Bowman Chrome foil pack raised and held up to camera
card: chrome football card (dark uniform QB, U logo) slides up and settles centered
card: orange/white #2 QB chrome card slides up and settles centered
card: portrait figure card held at window open (distinct card, settled hold)
card: colorful red/orange multi-figure card slides up and settles ~1166.6
card: gold/yellow refractor figure card slow reveal, settles ~1185.3
card: final card - player in red uniform (#15 DESIO refractor), slides up at 1187.1 settles ~1188.7, held clean to window end
